title: billardiera bicolor
intro: Billardiera bicolor, also known as Blueberry Lily or Purple and Blue Lily, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Pittosporaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Billardiera bicolor include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Billardiera bicolor include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, syrups, and topical creams for various health purposes.
